name: Juniper Ridge Resort
description: Juniper Ridge Resort is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Show Low, AZ. There is 1 outdoor concrete court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Players have access to lights. A membership is required to play.

name: Phony Phields
description: This court does not exist and is exists only for testing. It's not a pickleball court. Please do not come here expecting to play pickleball.

name: Pinetop Lakes Golf and Country Club
description: Come play pickleball at Pinetop Lakes Golf and Country Club in Hondah, AZ! There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms and water.

name: Pinetop-Lakeside Gym
description: Pinetop-Lakeside Gym is a place to play pickleball in Pinetop-Lakeside, AZ. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Show Low City Gym
description: Show Low City Gym is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Show Low, AZ. There are 15 asphalt courts. 3 are indoors and 12 are outdoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Snowflake Town Park
description: Snowflake Town Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Snowflake, AZ. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Woodland Lake Park
description: Come play pickleball at Woodland Lake Park in Pinetop-Lakeside, AZ! There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.
